s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STEERING LOCK ACTUATOR ASSEMBLY (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the steering lock actuator assembly and the steering lock bracket with 2 new tapered-head bolts.
Tighten the 2 tapered-head bolts until the bolt heads break off.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL IGNITION OR STARTER SWITCH ASSEMBLY (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the ignition or starter switch assembly to the steering lock sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL KEY INTERLOCK SOLENOID (for Automatic Transaxle without Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Install the key interlock solenoid to the steering lock sub-assembly with the 2 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UN-LOCK WARNING SWITCH ASSEMBLY (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the un-lock warning switch assembly to the steering lock sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL IGNITION SWITCH LOCK CYLINDER ASSEMBLY (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Make sure that the ignition switch lock cylinder assembly is in the ACC position.
Install the ignition switch lock cylinder assembly to the steering lock sub-assembly.
Make sure that the ignition switch lock cylinder assembly is securely installed.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT STEERING LOCK OPERATION (w/o Smart Key System)
INSTALL STEERING COLUMN UPPER WITH SWITCH BRACKET ASSEMBLY (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the steering column upper with switch bracket assembly and the steering lock bracket with 2 new tapered-head bolts.
Tighten the 2 tapered-head bolts until the bolt heads break off.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL TRANSPONDER KEY AMPLIFIER (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Align the transponder key amplifier with the installation position of the upper bracket with the amplifier inclined.
Push the transponder key amplifier up and install it to the upper bracket.

atten3.ptxt: Do not push the amplifier up with excessive force.
